headlines.title: FAF Q2 Earnings Top Estimates on Title Strength, Investment Income
headlines.summary: First American Financial's Q2 is driven by commercial title strength, higher investment income and average revenue per order, lifting earnings and revenue above estimates.

headlines.title: Globe Life Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates on Escalating Expenses
headlines.summary: GL misses Q2 earnings estimates but raises its 2026 outlook as premium growth, underwriting strength and investment income support results.

headlines.title: 3 Market-Beating Stocks for Long-Term Investors
headlines.summary: Stocks that outperform the market usually share key traits such as rising sales, expanding margins, and increasing returns on capital. The select few that can do all three for many years are often the ones that make you life-changing money.

headlines.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) Hit a 52 Week High, Can the Run Continue?
headlines.summary: Travelers (TRV) is at a 52-week high, but can investors hope for more gains in the future? We take a look at the company's fundamentals for clues.

headlines.title: Are You Looking for a Top Momentum Pick? Why Travelers (TRV) is a Great Choice
headlines.summary: Does Travelers (TRV) have what it takes to be a top stock pick for momentum investors? Let's find out.

description: The Travelers Companies, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides a range of commercial and personal property, and casualty insurance products and services to businesses, government units, associations, and individuals in the United States, Canada, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Business Insurance, Bond & Specialty Insurance, and Personal Insurance. The Business Insurance segment offers workers' compensation, commercial automobile and property, general liability, commercial multi-peril, employers' liability, public and product liability, professional indemnity, marine, aviation, commercial property and automobile, onshore and offshore energy, construction, terrorism, personal accident, and kidnap and ransom insurance products. This segment operates through select accounts, which serve small businesses; middle accounts that serve mid-sized businesses; national accounts, which serve large companies; and national property and others that serve large and mid-sized customers, commercial trucking industry, and agricultural businesses, as well as markets and distributes its products through brokers, wholesale agents, and program managers. The Bond & Specialty Insurance segment provides surety, fidelity, management and professional liability, and other property and casualty coverages and related risk management services through independent agencies and brokers. The Personal Insurance segment offers property and casualty insurance covering personal risks, primarily automobile and homeowners' insurance to individuals. The Travelers Companies, Inc. was founded in 1853 and is based in New York, New York.
